title: FineScale GUI
description: Unlock smooth decimal GUI scaling in Minecraft! Replace the limited 1–2–3 GUI sizes with a precise slider for perfect UI sizing on any screen.
body:
FineScale GUI enhances Minecraft’s GUI scaling system by replacing the default step-based options (1, 2, 3, Auto) with a smooth, precise slider that supports decimal values such as 1.1, 1.25, 1.75, and more.

This allows players to fine-tune their interface size for any resolution, monitor size, or personal preference — perfect for ultrawide displays, laptops, high-DPI monitors, and custom setups.

Changes apply instantly with live preview.
